title: Revenue Operations
shortSummary: RevOps is the future of go-to-market. Learn how marketing, sales, and customer success align around the full customer lifecycle to drive predictable revenue.
whyItMatters: Revenue Operations (RevOps) breaks down the silos between marketing, sales, and customer success to create a unified revenue engine. As companies mature, they realise that optimising each function in isolation creates handoff gaps, data inconsistencies, and a fragmented customer experience. RevOps is the fastest-growing function in B2B — understanding it makes you a more strategic seller and prepares you for executive-level roles.
coreConcepts: The RevOps model: aligning marketing, sales, and CS
Customer lifecycle revenue: acquisition to expansion to renewal
Data architecture: single source of truth across GTM
Compensation design that drives the right behaviours
